reviews.review_title: Can't download it anymore. Oculus fix it
reviews.review_description:
I have 166 games and this 1 of about 40 I can no longer download. Still happy to sell them though.

Oculus, get your act together!  Other games with same issue are:

Gunjack

Anshar 2

Gunsight

Dark Days Narratie escape room

Adventures of ice cream

VYCM

Ghosts in a toy box

Temple run

Lamper VR firefly rescue

ZED shot

Mr cat's adventure

The purge day

Hidden temple vr adventure

Prison vr

Romans 360

Faceted Flight

Space maze

Combat vr

Vaptain 13

Shooting showdown 2

The hunter

Zombie fun

Magic smash

A Lunar adventure

Soul Dimension

Pupil

Castaways vr

Krypt Crawler

Micromachines VR Racing

Duckpocalypse

Turkey Hunt

Balloon Shooter VR

Bee Invasion 3D
Grear fun and cool graphics just wish you buy some upgrades with coin you collect

I bought this several months ago and it was smooth as butter. Didn't play it again until recently, and the lag was horrible. Something is very wrong with the current version of the game; no one should buy it until it's fixed.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we've recently delivered an update to improve this issue! We hope that you will check it out and if you have any additional issues please feel free to share them with us at devs@archiactvr.com

reviews.review_title: Look n fly with head thru maze

reviews.review_description: I start playing it starts flashing then it restarts over and over I would like my credit back thanks

developer_response.body: Hi! We're so sorry you're experiencing technical difficulties. Please email us at devs@archiactvr.com and we'll be able to help you out asap!

reviews.review_description: Can't install it I will leave a good rating when I play it

The game starts out well, with mild challenge, but still amusing.  A few minutes in, you realize there is no chapter/ level end.  You just play for score, or until you give up and crash to end it.  Not great, but not a bad addition to a library.

reviews.review_title: Waste of money. Won't work at all.
reviews.review_description: Won't run on my s7. Just flashes a black screen every few seconds and is not playable.
